The '''''Sungrass''''' was a [[Xiytiar-class heavy transport|''Xiytiar''-class heavy transport]] used by [[Wraith Squadron]] during their time posing as the [[Hawk-bat Independent Space Force]] in the [[Halmad system/Legends|Halmad system]].

Previously belonging to an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] shipping corporation, it was stationed at a facility which was attacked by [[New Republic Intelligence Service|New Republic Intelligence]] and listed by the Empire as destroyed. In reality it was repaired and given a new name and history.

As part of the Hawk-bat ruse, the ''Sungrass''{{'s}} primary role was to act as a transport for the unit's [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIEs]], which were otherwise incapable of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] travel. It was commanded by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Valton]].

{{Ship-stub}}
